x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to monitor and update the available balances of accounts or instruments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exposure Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to monitor credit, market, or operational exposures associated with positions, loans, or obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Status Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to track the value, allocation, and sufficiency of collateral supporting obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Status Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to monitor the progress or completion of specific transactions (e.g., pending, settled, failed).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity Status Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to assess and report the available liquidity across accounts or arrangements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Profit and Loss Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to calculate and update realized and unrealized profit and loss on positions or transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit Monitoring Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to track compliance with credit, risk, or operational limits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Status Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to perform financial status updates or reporting at predefined intervals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Status Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to track or report only when predefined thresholds or triggers are met.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Summary Reporting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to generate consolidated reports summarizing account, portfolio, or arrangement financial status.
